# Phase 17 — Pattern map

**Analog:** `legal.html` (and identical main-body structure in `privacy.html`, `compliance.html`).

**Files to mirror:** When changing vertical rhythm, apply the **same** class string edits to:

- `legal.html` — `<main id="main-content">` and the first child `div.max-w-3xl` block (draft div, `h1`, `p` list)
- `privacy.html` — same structure (ids: `privacy-*` in header only; main block matches)
- `compliance.html` — same

**Do not edit:** inline `<script>` blocks, `i18n.js` / `social-urls.js` references, footer `id` prefixes (`footer-social-legal`, etc.).

---

## PATTERN MAPPING COMPLETE
